sourceMovie.title: Chronicle
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Chronicle (2012) as a science fiction theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The science fiction and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Logan
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Chronicle clicked for you, Logan (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Chronicle clicked for you, Minority Report (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Chronicle?
faq.answer: Try Logan, Minority Report, Cloverfield—each shares DNA with Chronicle while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Chronicle?
faq.answer: Chronicle (2012) is best described as Science Fiction, Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Chronicle worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
